## Review Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `docs/PR_REVIEW_CHECKLIST.md` for the PR type.
- [ ] No automatic trading, broker-write behavior, or order preview behavior was added.
- [ ] Recommendation labels, scoring, target blending, and decision-safety behavior changed only if intentional and documented.
- [ ] Provider gaps and source-health states remain visible.
- [ ] Package boundaries and script-wrapper compatibility remain intact.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/check_quality.py` or documented why it was not run.
